scripts.start: npm run build -w @argent/registry && npm run dev -w @argent/tool-server
scripts.start:tool-server: npm run build -w @argent/registry && npm run dev -w @argent/tool-server
scripts.pack:mcp:local: npm run download:simulator-server && npm run build:ios-binaries && npm run build:android-binaries && npm run build && npm run build -w @swmansion/argent && npm pack -w @swmansion/argent --pack-destination .
